# MyResumeCompany

> AI-powered resume builder with 15+ professional templates, ATS scanner, and cover letter generator.

## About
MyResumeCompany is an online resume builder that combines professionally designed templates with AI writing tools. Users can create, edit, and export resumes as pixel-perfect PDFs. The platform includes an AI bullet point writer, professional summary generator, full resume wizard, ATS (Applicant Tracking System) scanner and optimizer, and cover letter generator.

## Key Features
- 15 resume templates: Classic, Modern, Creative, Tech, ATS-Optimized, Academic
- AI bullet point writer: Generates achievement-focused bullets with metrics
- AI summary generator: Creates professional summaries in 3 tones
- AI resume wizard: Builds a complete resume from 5 questions
- ATS scanner: Scores resumes 0-100 against job descriptions, identifies missing keywords
- ATS optimizer: Rewrites bullets to match job requirements
- Cover letter generator: Personalized cover letters with tone and length options
- Drag-and-drop editor with real-time preview
- PDF export with pixel-perfect formatting
- Public shareable resume links

## Pricing
- Free: 100 credits on signup, all features accessible
- Starter: ₹199 for 200 credits
- Popular: ₹449 for 500 credits
- Pro Pack: ₹899 for 1,200 credits
- Credits never expire. No subscriptions.

## Technical
- Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript
- AI powered by Google Gemini API
- Payments via Razorpay
- Hosted on Vercel
